perturbation.original_text: Borrower shall maintain the Information in confidence and shall not disclose the information to any third party with out the consent of Lending Agent; provided, however, that Borrower may disclose the Information to the extent required by Sample 2 subpoena, court order, request from a regulatory body with jurisdiction over Borrower, or as otherwise required by law or regulation. Borrower shall not be required to keep the Information confidential to the extent that the Information (a) becomes publicly known through means other than a breach of this Agreement by Borrower; (b) was in the possession of Borrower prior to receipt thereo f from the Lending Agent; or (c) is independently learned, obtained or developed by Borrower without violating the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Borrower shall maintain the Information in confidence and shall not disclose the information to any third party with out the consent of Lending Agent; Borrower is also allowed to disclose the Information to the extent required by subpoena, court order, request from a regulatory body with jurisdiction over Borrower, or as otherwise required by law or regulation. Borrower shall be required to keep the Information confidential even if the Information (a) becomes publicly known through means other than a breach of this Agreement by Borrower; (b) was in the possession of Borrower prior to receipt thereo f from the Lending Agent; or (c) is independently learned, obtained or developed by Borrower without violating the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text removes the exceptions where the borrower is NOT required to keep the information confidential and replaces them with 'Borrower shall be required to keep the Information confidential even if', creating an in-text contradiction. Previously, if the information was publicly known, already in the borrower's possession, or independently learned, the confidentiality obligation was waived. Now, those exceptions are removed, and the borrower is always obligated to keep the information confidential. This introduces contradiction and causes uncertainty regarding the confidentiality obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Borrower shall maintain the Information in confidence and shall not disclose the information to any third party with out the consent of Lending Agent; Borrower is also allowed to disclose the Information to the extent required by subpoena, court order, request from a regulatory body with jurisdiction over Borrower, or as otherwise required by law or regulation. Borrower shall be required to keep the Information confidential even if the Information (a) becomes publicly known through means other than a breach of this Agreement by Borrower; (b) was in the possession of Borrower prior to receipt thereo f from the Lending Agent; or (c) is independently learned, obtained or developed by Borrower without violating the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original clause regarding confidentiality. The original text allowed exceptions to the confidentiality obligation if the information was already public, in the borrower's possession, or independently learned. The changed text removes these exceptions, stating that the borrower is required to keep the information confidential 'even if' those conditions are met. This creates a direct conflict and contradiction within the contract because the modified section contradicts the previous exception, which is now entirely removed. The contradicted text is in the same location as the changed text. This change introduces a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: If Borrower (or its employees or agents) breaches or threatens to breach this Agreement, Lending Agent may, in addi tion to any other remedies available, seek any equitable remedy it deems appropriate to enjoin an actual or threatened violation by Borrower.
perturbation.changed_text: If Borrower (or its employees or agents) breaches or threatens to breach this Agreement, Lending Agent must only seek monetary damages. The Lending Agent is explicitly prohibited from seeking any equitable remedy, including injunctions, against an actual or threatened violation by Borrower.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text directly contradicts the original statement regarding remedies for breach. Originally, the Lending Agent could seek equitable remedies (like injunctions) in addition to other options. The changed text now restricts the Lending Agent to only seeking monetary damages, explicitly prohibiting equitable remedies. This creates a direct in-text contradiction regarding the available remedies and could lead to disputes over enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: If Borrower (or its employees or agents) breaches or threatens to breach this Agreement, Lending Agent must only seek monetary damages. The Lending Agent is explicitly prohibited from seeking any equitable remedy, including injunctions, against an actual or threatened violation by Borrower.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly prohibits the Lending Agent from seeking equitable remedies, including injunctions, while the contradicted text states the same prohibition. The original text allowed for equitable remedies, creating a direct contradiction with both the changed and contradicted sections regarding the available remedies for breach, fitting the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall be binding upon and shall inure to the benefit of the parties hereto and their respective successors and permitted assigns. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Borrower and Lending Agent hereby hereby irrevocably waive any and all rights to trial by jury in any legal proceeding arising out of or relating to this Agreement. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement and understanding between the parties and supersedes any and all prior agreements and understandings, oral or written, relating to th e subject matter hereof. This Agreement may not be amended except by a writing signed by both parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall not be binding upon and shall not inure to the benefit of the parties hereto and their respective successors and permitted assigns. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, with full regard to its conflict of law principles. Borrower and Lending Agent hereby reserve all rights to trial by jury in any legal proceeding arising out of or relating to this Agreement. This Agreement constitutes only a partial agreement and understanding between the parties and does not supersede any and all prior agreements and understandings, oral or written, relating to th e subject matter hereof. This Agreement may be amended orally by either party hereto.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text introduces several direct contradictions within Section 7. First, it reverses the binding nature of the agreement, stating it is *not* binding. Second, it changes the governing law from New York to Delaware and *includes* conflict of law principles. Third, it reverses the jury trial waiver, now *reserving* the right to a jury trial. Fourth, it changes the agreement from a complete agreement to a partial agreement and notes that *oral* agreements are okay. Fifth, it changes the amendment process by permitting *oral* changes, whereas the original specifies *written* amendments. This section is now internally inconsistent and introduces significant legal uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall not be binding upon and shall not inure to the benefit of the parties hereto and their respective successors and permitted assigns. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, with full regard to its conflict of law principles. Borrower and Lending Agent hereby reserve all rights to trial by jury in any legal proceeding arising out of or relating to this Agreement. This Agreement constitutes only a partial agreement and understanding between the parties and does not supersede any and all prior agreements and understandings, oral or written, relating to th e subject matter hereof. This Agreement may be amended orally by either party hereto.
perturbation.justification: The modified text introduces multiple contradictions. It states the agreement is 'not binding,' directly contradicting the original assumption and legal understanding of the contract's enforceability. It changes the governing law and introduces oral amendments, which directly clashes with the original text specifying written amendments. The contradictory text provided is identical to the Changed Text, and based on the Perturbation Explanation, all of the elements that were changed in the original text now contradict it.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall be effective as of the date set forth above. The obligations hereunder shall expire upon the earlier to occur of (a) ___ year s from the termination date of the last loan of securities outstanding under the Borrowing Agreement or (b) the date upon which the Information ceases to be confidential as set forth above.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall not be effective as of the date set forth above, but rather when both parties agree this agreement to be effective. The obligations hereunder shall never expire and will remain in effect indefinitely, regardless of any termination of the Borrowing Agreement or any changes in the confidentiality of the Information.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text contradicts the terms of the agreement's effectiveness and duration. Originally, the agreement was effective as of the date specified, and the obligations expired under specific conditions. The changed text now states the agreement is effective when both parties agree and that the obligations will never expire. This in-text contradiction creates uncertainty regarding when the agreement takes effect and for how long it remains in force.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall not be effective as of the date set forth above, but rather when both parties agree this agreement to be effective. The obligations hereunder shall never expire and will remain in effect indefinitely, regardless of any termination of the Borrowing Agreement or any changes in the confidentiality of the Information.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a strong in-text contradiction. The original text specifies that the agreement becomes effective on a specified date and has a defined expiration based on loan termination or confidentiality. The changed text states the agreement is effective only upon mutual agreement of the parties and that it never expires. This directly contradicts the original terms for both effectiveness and duration, thus generating a clear contradiction and making enforcement uncertain. The contradiction is further emphasized as the Changed Text and Contradicted Text are identical in this instance.
